title: This Ex-Quant Had to Quit Wall Street to Build a 24/7 Stock Exchange | QFEX, Annanay Kapila
summary: Annanay Kapila, a former quantitative trader who managed billions in daily trading volume, argues that high-frequency trading adds no value and extracts profit through structural market flaws. He left finance to build QFEX, a 24/7 global stock exchange, motivated by concerns that traditional markets are broken and driven by frustration with how the industry traps talented mathematicians.
